svg.title: ADAM // COMMAND CENTER — Tactical Track Grid
svg.desc: A green-phosphor NORAD-style command dashboard: a dot-grid world map with a scanning sweep, satellite blips on curved orbits, a Bangkok-to-Seattle great-circle route, a radar router table, a live radar sweep, twin spinning mini-globes, station readouts for daily brief, markets and agent ops, marching field-crew sprites, and a bottom status ticker — all rendered with layered phosphor glow, drifting scanlines and a CRT vignette.
svg.text: ▸ SAT-22 ACQUIRING · ▸ ROUTE SEA→BKK NOMINAL · ▸ MAIL-AGENT SYNC 201 · ▸ NBIS -3.2 ALERT · ▸ DOG WALK 17:00 ·
▸ WESTERN STATE 62% · ▸ TESLA LEMON-LAW PENDING · ▸ MOM-POA FILE · ▸ SKIN ROUTINE 21:00 · ▸ HOME BILLS DUE ·
